tools.name: create_blackboard
tools.description: Create a Blackboard Data asset with typed keys. Blackboards are the shared memory for Behavior Trees — NPCs use them to store perception data, target references, patrol points, and state flags.

tools.name: create_behavior_tree
tools.description: Create a Behavior Tree asset and optionally assign a Blackboard. Behavior Trees define NPC decision-making logic using Composites (Selector, Sequence), Tasks, Decorators, and Services.

blackboard_asset.description: Content path of the Blackboard to assign (e.g., '/Game/AI/BB_Enemy')

tools.name: inject_bt_nodes
tools.description: Add nodes to an existing Behavior Tree. Supports composite nodes (Selector, Sequence, Parallel) and task nodes (Wait, MoveTo). The first composite becomes the root if none exists; subsequent nodes are added as children of the root.

asset_path.description: Content path of the Behavior Tree

nodes.description: Array of node definitions to inject

wait_time.description: For Wait nodes: duration in seconds

acceptable_radius.description: For MoveTo nodes: arrival acceptance radius in UU

tools.name: configure_navmesh
tools.description: Set up navigation mesh for AI pathfinding. Spawns a NavMeshBoundsVolume in the current level (if one doesn't exist) and triggers a NavMesh rebuild. Required for any MoveTo-based AI behavior.

scale.description: Scale of the volume (each unit ≈ 200 UU, so 50 = ~100m). Default: (50, 50, 10)

rebuild.description: Whether to trigger NavMesh rebuild immediately (default: true)
